channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Should You Buy Tesla Stock Before Earnings on July 22?
item.description: Tesla investors need to be patient as developments unfold, and there won't be a one-off, game-changing event at the company in 2027.

item.title: Alphabet's Waymo, Baidu Ahead of Competitors in Robotaxi Space, Wedbush Says
item.description: Alphabet's (GOOG) Waymo and Baidu (BIDU) are well ahead of competitors in the robotaxi industry, wit

item.title: Two Risks for Tesla Stock Not Everyone Is Talking About
item.description: Tesla stock has been stuck for the past few months, supported by hopes for a SpaceX merger while the company’s progress on AI efforts remain opaque.

item.title: Here’s How Much Traders See Tesla Stock Moving After Earnings
item.description: Tesla is set to report earnings Wednesday afternoon, with traders anticipating a big move from the EV maker’s stock following the results.

item.title: Elon Musk Is Betting Big on Natural Gas. Here's What It Means for Energy Stocks.
item.description: Natural gas remains vital for both current and future energy needs, and SpaceX investments are helping support demand.

item.title: Nasdaq, S&P 500 Futures Slide As Chip Stocks Tumble, Iran Tensions Fuel Risk-Off Mood: Why NFLX, NBIS, SPCX, TSLA, DJT, SLS Are In Focus
item.description: Stocktwits data showed retail sentiment remained ‘bullish’ on QQQ but moderated to ‘neutral’ on SPY.

item.title: Honda to end Prologue sales in the US
item.description: Honda has confirmed that it will discontinue the Prologue after the 2026 model year. The move marks the conclusion of Honda’s Ultium-based EV partnership with General Motors and leaves the brand without a BEV offering in North America.

item.title: Elon Musk Has Never Sold His Tesla Vision. Should You Buy the Dip Before July 22?
item.description: Is Tesla's dip below $400 a buying opportunity, or is Wall Street still pricing in too much optimism? Here's why the answer depends more on your long-term conviction than next week's earnings report.

item.title: TSLA Stock Slips Overnight: Gary Black Says SpaceX Can’t Afford Tesla – ‘The Math Won’t Pass Muster’
item.description: Black rejected speculation that SpaceX could acquire Tesla, saying Musk’s voting control does not remove SpaceX’s fiduciary duties.

item.title: SpaceX Starship Flight 13 aborted at Zero and Musk just told us what broke
item.description: SpaceX scrubbed the Starship Flight 13 launch attempt Thursday evening at the last possible moment, after four of the Super Heavy booster’s 33 Raptor 3 engines failed to ignite during the startup sequence. The 90-minute window had opened at 6:45 p.m. EDT from Starbase in Boca Chica, Texas, and th...

item.title: Tesla finally launches a bike — but it’s not what fans wanted
item.description: Tesla fans have spent years begging the company to build an e-bike. Tesla just launched a bike — and it has no motor, no pedals, and it’s for toddlers. The new “Balance Bike for Kids” sells for $225 on Tesla’s online shop, and it’s aimed at children aged 2 to 5.

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) shareholders are begging Musk to explain missed goals
item.description: Tesla shareholders have flooded the company’s Q2 2026 earnings Q&A portal with questions, and the most-upvoted ones tell a bleak story: retail investors are now demanding that Elon Musk explain why the company keeps missing its own short-term goals. The tone has shifted from asking about Tesla’s ...

item.title: Tesla's 2026 Q2 Earnings Call: How to Listen
item.description: Tesla's 2026 Q2 Earnings Call: How to Listen

item.title: Tesla Was Cleared in a Texas Crash. Why the Stock Is Down Anyway.
item.description: Tesla’s FSD driver assistance product was cleared in a recent tragic crash in Texas that killed one person.

item.title: SpaceX Stock Breaks The IPO Price—and Cathie Wood Keeps Buying the Dip
item.description: SpaceX stock has lost altitude recently, closing below its IPO price for the first time on Thursday, creating an opportunity for Cathie Wood’s ARK Invest. ARK is a big believer in Elon Musk. It was the stock’s first close below the $135 IPO price.

item.title: Tesla Earnings Loom After Surprise Delivery Beat Stuns Wall Street
item.description: Tesla Stock Faces Its Biggest Test Yet. Here's What Investors Need to See

item.title: Elon Musk Buys Gas Turbine Company in $1 Billion Deal
item.description: Elon Musk Buys Gas Turbine Company in $1 Billion Deal

item.title: Elon Musk's Net Worth Is Plummeting -- Here's What That Means for SpaceX Stock
item.description: He is no longer a trillionaire.

item.title: Elon Musk's Political Spending Hits $90 Million With New $5 Million Donation
item.description: FEC filings show Musk increased support for Republican candidates, including Vivek Ramaswamy's Ohio gubernatorial campaign.

item.title: SpaceX Bears Gain as Stock Drops
item.description: Stock slides below IPO price before key catalysts

item.title: Tesla Delivered 480,126 Vehicles Last Quarter. Here's Why the Stock Didn't Rally.
item.description: Good news isn't necessarily bullish when the company is changing faster than investors can fill in the unknowns.

item.title: Elon Musk secretly acquires $1B energy company to power the AI future
item.description: Elon Musk flew under the radar with his recent purchase of a $1 billion energy company, according to Federal Trade Commission (FTC) documents. Transaction number 202612350 listed Tesla and SpaceX frontman Elon Musk as the acquiring party and CF APR Super Holdings LLC as the seller, with New APR E...

item.title: Tesla's Robotaxi Just Launched in Miami. Here's How Small the Service Area Really Is
item.description: Sometimes it seems like Elon Musk is at the forefront of every new frontier, but that isn't always the case.

item.title: Tesla Had Its Own Category on 'Jeopardy!' in 2014
item.description: Tesla Had Its Own Category on 'Jeopardy!' in 2014

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) Faces Fresh Questions As SpaceX Merger Talk Gains Traction
item.description: Growing discussion about a potential merger between Tesla and SpaceX, with increased public commentary from high profile investors. Speculation centers on whether Elon Musk could combine the two companies to create a unified capital base and shared balance sheet. Prediction markets and market com...

item.title: Xpeng’s new L03 undercuts Tesla Model Y by up to $10,000 in Europe
item.description: Xpeng launched its new L03 electric SUV-coupe in Europe this week with a starting price of €34,990 — undercutting the Tesla Model Y by roughly €3,400 in Germany and by around $10,000 in Norway. The pricing puts a well-equipped 4.65-meter electric SUV directly under Tesla’s best-seller in its high...

item.title: Tesla has to fix a big problem with its old headlights, NHTSA says
item.description: Tesla had a petition protesting a recall to fix a potential issue with 2017-2023 Model Y and Model 3 vehicles’ headlights was denied, as the National Highway Traffic Safety Administration (NHTSA) disagreed with the company’s opinion of things. The recall covers approximately 19,917 Model Y and Mo...

item.title: Elon Musk Says Government-Issued Universal High Income Checks Are Best Fix for AI Job Loss — ‘Everyone Can Have a Penthouse if They Want’
item.description: If artificial intelligence rewrites the future of work, Tesla and SpaceX CEO Elon Musk thinks it should rewrite the future of paychecks, too. "Universal HIGH INCOME via checks issued by the Federal government is the best way to deal with...

item.title: Top Alternate USB Drives for Tesla's Dashcam and Sentry Mode Features
item.description: Top Alternate USB Drives for Tesla's Dashcam and Sentry Mode Features

item.title: Piper cautious on SpaceX, points to near-term headwinds
item.description: Investing.com -- Piper Sandler initiated coverage of SpaceX at Neutral with a price target of $156 in a note Thursday, citing idiosyncratic near-term headwinds despite a constructive multi-year view on the company.

item.title: Tesla: The Bull Case Is Falling Apart
SpaceX Stock Falls Below $135 IPO Price—and Cathie Wood Keeps Buying the Dip
item.description: FEATURE SpaceX stock has lost altitude recently, creating an opportunity for Cathie Wood’s ARK Invest. Four ARK funds, including the flagship ARK Innovation ETF snapped up about 123,000 SpaceX shares, worth almost $17 million, on Wednesday.

item.title: Tesla Stock's Future Comes With A Hefty Price Tag
item.description: While investors focus on robots and AI, the company's spending plan reveals one number that could test the high-flying stock.

item.title: Tesla and Rivian Are Both Down 12%. Here's the Better Buy for the Second Half of 2026.
item.description: Tesla is chasing the future with robotaxis, but Rivian's R2 launch could make it the more compelling EV stock.

item.title: Tesla Cybertruck: Slippery Surface Mode
item.description: Tesla Cybertruck: Slippery Surface Mode

item.title: World premiere: Xpeng L03 promises rapid charging at a bargain price
item.description: At its Global Brand Event in Munich, Xpeng unveiled its most affordable model to date. The L03 undercuts Tesla and Hyundai on starting price and, despite its 400-volt technology, charges to 80 per cent in just 20 minutes. The brand also outlined its broader vision of an integrated mobility ecosys...

item.title: Tesla Rides Tightening Global Emission Standards for EV Thrust
item.description: TSLA stands to gain as tighter global emissions rules spur EV adoption, while scale, software and a lower-cost model support long-term growth.

item.title: Tesla Stock: Here's What Retail Investors Want To Know Ahead Of Earnings
item.description: Ahead of next week's earnings call, Tesla retail investors wanted updates from CEO Elon Musk on robotaxi expansion and Cybercab production.

item.title: Tesla Cleared in Recent Texas Crash. Why the Stock Is Down Anyway.
item.description: Tesla’s FSD driver assistance product was cleared in a recent tragic crash in Texas that killed one person.

item.title: Chamath Palihapitiya Sees ‘Very Obvious Industrial Logic’ in SpaceX Acquiring Tesla to Fund Elon Musk’s Broad Swath Of Projects
item.description: Venture capitalist Chamath Palihapitiya said on Tuesday that investors are overlooking a major near-term value driver for SpaceX, arguing that Elon Musk could create strategic and financial leverage by combining the space venture and Tesla Inc. under one corporate structure....

item.title: Morgan Stanley Resets Tesla Stock Price Target for 2027
item.description: Morgan Stanley Sends Mixed Signal on Tesla: Higher Target, Same Rating

item.title: Cathie Wood’s ARK Buys SpaceX Stock Ahead of Starship Test 13
item.description: SpaceX stock has lost altitude recently, creating an opportunity for Cathie Wood’s ARK Invest. ARK is a big believer in Elon Musk. Coming into Thursday trading, SpaceX stock was down for three consecutive days and seven of the past nine days, leaving shares just 27 cents above the $135 IPO price.

item.title: SpaceX IPO & why oil could hit $150: Robinhood Exec
item.description: Robinhood executives Stephanie Guild and Steve Quirk join Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi to break down the unprecedented wave of upcoming AI and SpaceX IPOs, the risks of the "Magnificent Seven" market concentration, and why a looming $150 oil shock could test the stock market this su...

item.title: Traders cool on Tesla-SpaceX merger as Polymarket odds slide
item.description: Traders on Polymarket have sharply scaled back bets that a Tesla-SpaceX merger will be announced this year, even as Wall Street analysts insist a tie-up is only a matter of time. The prediction market now puts just an 11% chance on an official announcement by 30 September, down 28 percentage...

item.title: TSLA Stock Eyes Weekly Loss: Retail Investors Grill Musk On Missed Robotaxi Targets Ahead Of Q2 Earnings
item.description: Optimus is the second-biggest concern, with investors seeking production and deployment updates.

item.title: Tesla Q2 Earnings: Elon Musk's Pay Package, Cybercab and Optimus Lead Top Investor Questions
item.description: As Elon Musk-led automaker Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) is set to hold its second-quarter earnings call with investors next week, here are some top questions investors have submitted for the EV giant’s management. Robotaxi, Optimus Under Spotlight On Wednesday, influencer Sawyer Merritt took to X, sh...

item.title: The Zacks Analyst Blog Highlights Tesla, Space Exploration Technologies, Amazon.com and Microsoft
item.description: Space Exploration Technologies is emerging as Elon Musk's biggest value creator, driven by Starlink, launch leadership and expanding AI ambitions.

item.title: NTSB findings on fatal Tesla crash tell a very different story
item.description: The National Transportation Safety Board released preliminary findings Wednesday confirming that a Tesla driver, not the vehicle’s software, caused a fatal crash in Katy, Texas in June. The driver, 44-year-old Michael Butler, had engaged Full Self-Driving Supervised mode on Rose Hollow Lane, a re...

item.title: Energy business, used car business, and plain ol’ business business
item.description: Today’s episode of Quick Charge means business – the business of buying up power stations to power up the pet AI that says it would have picked you over Michael Jordan in the 1984 NBA draft and the business of fleecing well-heeled car collectors out of an extra $100,000 on a (mostly) new Tesla Mo...

item.title: The Top Mag 7 Stock Headed Into Q2 Earnings: Jefferies Says Buy Amazon Over Tesla or Apple
item.description: With Q2 earnings closing in, Jefferies just named its top Magnificent 7 pick and the choice cuts across some of the most widely held retirement stocks in America. One of these three tech giants wins on valuation, one wins on income, and one barely shows up to the fight.
